# NLaszlo.github.io
Personal site



<head>
    <meta charset="utf8">
    <meta name="author" content="John Doe">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">

    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/bulma/0.6.1/css/bulma.min.css" />
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/vue/2.5.9/vue.js"></script>
    <script defer src="https://use.fontawesome.com/releases/v5.0.1/js/all.js"></script>

    <style>
        .hoverTextAnim {
            font-weight: bold;
            -webkit-animation: anm_level 0.4s;
            -webkit-animation-direction: alternate;
            -webkit-animation-iteration-count: inherit;
            -webkit-animation-fill-mode: forwards;
            animation: anm_level 0.4s;
            animation-direction: alternate;
            animation-direction: alternate;
            animation-iteration-count: inherit;
            animation-fill-mode: forwards;
        }

        @keyframes anm_level {
            from {
                padding-right: 0px;
                padding-left: 0px;
            }

            to {
                padding-right: 4px;
                padding-left: 4px;
            }
        }

        @-webkit-keyframes anm_level {
            from {
                padding-right: 0px;
                padding-left: 0px;
            }

            to {
                padding-right: 4px;
                padding-left: 4px;
            }
        }

        ul {
            list-style: square;
        }

        .resume {
            background-color: #fff;
            -webkit-box-shadow: 0 2px 3px rgba(10, 10, 10, .1), 0 0 0 1px rgba(10, 10, 10, .1);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 3px rgba(10, 10, 10, .1), 0 0 0 1px rgba(10, 10, 10, .1);
            color: #4a4a4a;
            /* max-width: 100%; */
            max-width: 1080px;
            position: relative;
        }

        .subsubtitle {
            margin-top: -24px;
            padding-left: 1px;
        }

        #slctLang {
            position: absolute;
            margin-right: 24px;
            right: 0;
        }

        .datetag {
            /* background-color: #f5f5f5;
            border-radius: 3px;
            padding: 5px;
			*/
			font-size:15px;
        }

        .progress {
            width: 320px;
        }

        .full {
            width: 100%;
        }

        table.full td:first-child {
            font-weight: bold;
        }

        .theadr {
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 24px;
        }

        .linktitle{
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .section {
            padding-bottom: 1rem;
            padding-top: 1rem;
        }

        .paddingless{
            padding-top: 0;
            padding-bottom: 0;
        }
        .notvisible{
            display: none;
        }

        body {
            margin: 0;
        }

        canvas {
            display: block;
            position:fixed;
            top:0;
            left:0;
        }

    </style>
	<style media="print">
        #slctLang{
            display: none;
        }
		
		.resume {
			box-shadow: none;
		}
		
		#app {
			margin: 0;
		}
		
		.column.is-one-fifth {
			width: 22%;
		}
    </style>
    <title>CV</title>
</head>

<body style="background-color: #eee">
    <canvas id="canvas">Canvas is not supported in your browser.</canvas>
    <canvas id="canvas2">Canvas is not supported in your browser.</canvas>

    <div id="app" class="container resume">
        <section class="section">
            <div class="control">
                <div id="slctLang" class="select">
                    <select v-model="language">
                        <option>RO</option>
                        <option>EN</option>
                        <option>HU</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="media">
                <div class="media-left">
                    <figure class="image is-96x96">
                        <img src="data:image/png;base64,"/>
                    </figure>
                </div>
                <div class="media-right">
                    <!-- <div class="dropdown">
                            <div class="dropdown-trigger">
                              <button class="button" aria-haspopup="true" aria-controls="dropdown-menu">
                                <span>Dropdown button</span>
                                <span class="icon is-small">
                                  <i class="fa fa-angle-down" aria-hidden="true"></i>
                                </span>
                              </button>
                            </div>
                            <div class="dropdown-menu" id="lang-menu" role="menu">
                              <div class="dropdown-content">
                                <a href="#" class="dropdown-item">
                                  En
                                </a>
                                <a class="dropdown-item">
                                  Hu
                                </a>
                                <a href="#" class="dropdown-item">
                                  Ro
                                </a>
                              </div>
                            </div>
                          </div> -->
                </div>
                <div class="media-content">
                    <p class="title" v-text="resume.info.name">John Smith</p>
                    <p class="subtitle " v-text="resume.info.occupation">@johnsmith</p>
                    <p class="subsubtitle " style="font-size: 14px" >
                        <span v-text="yearold"></span>
                        <span v-text="resume.info.yr">years</span>
                    </p>
                    
                    <!-- <p class="subsubtitle " style="font-size: 14px">
                        (M, 
                        <span v-text="yearold">yr</span>
                        yr)
                    </p> -->
                </div>
            </div>
            <br />
            <div class="content">
                <nav class="level">
                    <div class="level-left">
                        <div class="level-item">
                            <span class="tag">
                                <span class="icon">
                                    <i class="fa fa-lg fa-envelope" aria-hidden="true"></i>
                                </span>
                                <a href="mailto:laszlo.n4gy@gmail.com" v-text="resume.info.email">youremail@email.com</a>
                            </span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="level-item" v-for="(nr, ind) in resume.info.phoneNumbers">
                        <span class="tag">
                            <span class="icon">
                                <i class="fa fa-lg fa-phone-square" aria-hidden="true"></i>
                            </span>
                            <a v-text="nr">0775628622</a>
                        </span>
                    </div>
                </nav>
                <p class="content" v-html="resume.info.summary ">
                </p>
            </div>

            <!-- 
            <div class="title" v-text="resume.info.name">
                Name
            </div>
            <div class="subtitle" v-text="resume.info.occupation"> 
            -->

        </section>
        <section class="section">
            <div class="tabs">
                <ul>
                    <li>
                        <a v-on:click="onTabClick">
                            <span class="icon is-medium">
                                <i :class="['fa', 'fa-2x', 'fa-' + resume.experience.icon]"></i>
                            </span>
                            <span class="title is-4" v-text="resume.experience.title">Experience</span>
                        </a>
                    </li>
                </ul>
            </div>

            <!-- <vuejob v-for="(job, ind) in resume.experience.jobs" content="job"></vuejob> -->
            <div class="columns" v-for="(job, ind) in resume.experience.jobs">
                <div class="column is-one-fifth">
                    <span class="datetag">
                        <strong v-text="job.from"></strong> -
                        <strong v-text="job.to"></strong>
                    </span>
                </div>
                <div class="column content">
                    <p class="title is-4" v-text="job.position">Job</p>
                    <p class="subtitle is-4">
                        <span v-text="job.company.name">company</span>
                        <span v-text="job.company.location"></span>
                    </p>
                    <P class="" v-html="job.jobDescription.summary">
                    </P>
                    <ul>
                        <li v-for="(task, ind) in job.jobDescription.tasks">
                            <span v-text="task"></span>
                        </li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>
        <section class="section">
            <div class="tabs">
                <ul>
                    <li>
                        <a>
                            <span class="icon is-medium">
                                <i :class="['fa', 'fa-2x', 'fa-' + resume.education.icon]"></i>
                            </span>
                            <span class="title is-4" v-text="resume.education.title">Education</span>
                        </a>
                    </li>
                </ul>
            </div>
            <div class="columns" v-for="(term, ind) in resume.education.sentences">
                <div class="column is-one-fifth">
                    <span class="datetag">
                        <strong v-text="term.from"></strong> -
                        <strong v-text="term.to"></strong>
                    </span>
                </div>
                <div class="column content">
                    <p class="title is-4" v-text="term.institution"></p>
                    <p class="subtitle is-4">
                        <span v-text="term.specialty"></span>
                    </p>
                    <p class="subsubtitle is-6">
                        <span v-text="term.reward"></span>
                    </p>
                    <div v-if="term.classes">
                        <span class="title is-5" v-text="term.classes.name"></span> :
                        <ul class="">
                            <li v-for="cl in term.classes.value" v-text="cl"></li>
                        </ul>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

        </section>
        <section class="section">
            <div class="tabs">
                <ul>
                    <li>
                        <a>
                            <span class="icon is-medium">
                                <i  :class="['fa', 'fa-2x', 'fa-' + resume.competences.icon]"></i>
                            </span>
                            <span class="title is-4" v-text="resume.competences.title">Competences</span>
                        </a>
                    </li>
                </ul>
            </div>
            <section class="section content paddingless" >
                <p class="theadr" v-text="resume.competences.languages.name">Languages:</p>
                <ul class="">
                    <li v-for="(lang, ind) in resume.competences.languages.collection">
                        <span :class="{ 'hoverTextAnim' : lang.isActive }" @mouseover="onMouseover(lang)" @mouseout="onMouseOut(lang)" style="padding-right:10px;">
                            <span v-text="lang.name"></span>
                            <span v-show="lang.isActive" v-text="'(' + lang.value + ')'"></span>
                        </span>
                    </li>

                    <!-- <span v-for="(lang, ind) in resume.competences.languages.collection">
                        <span :class="{ 'hoverTextAnim' : lang.isActive }" @mouseover="onMouseover(lang)" @mouseout="onMouseOut(lang)" style="padding-right:10px;">
                            <span v-text="lang.name"></span>
                            <span v-show="lang.isActive" v-text="'(' + lang.value + ')'"></span>
                        </span>
                    </span>  -->
                </ul>
            </section>
        <!-- <br /> -->
        <section class="section content paddingless">
            <div v-text="resume.competences.technical.name" class="theadr" style="margin-bottom: 12px">Technical summary</div>
            <!--
        <div v-for="(tech, ind) in resume.competences.technical" class="column">
             <div class="columns">
                <div class="column is-one-quarter">
                    <p v-text="tech.lang"></p>
                    <p v-text="tech.notes"></p>
                </div>
                <div class="column">
                    <progress class="progress is-info" :value="tech.level.value" max="100"></progress>
                    <span v-text="tech.level.name"></span>
                </div>
            </div> 
        </div>-->
            <table class="table full">
                <tr v-for="tech in resume.competences.technical.value">
                    <td>
                        <p v-text="tech.lang"></p>
                    </td>
                    <td>
                        <progress class="progress is-info" :title="tech.level.name" :value="tech.level.value" max="100"></progress>
                        <!-- <span v-text="tech.level.name"></span> -->
                    </td>
                    <td>
                        <p v-text="tech.notes"></p>
                    </td>
                </tr>
            </table>
            <div class="content">
                <p v-if="resume.competences.otherCompetences && resume.competences.otherCompetences.length > 0">
                    <b>Alte competențe:</b>
                    <span v-for="comp in resume.competences.otherCompetences">
                        <span v-if="resume.competences.otherCompetences.indexOf(comp) < resume.competences.otherCompetences.length - 1">, </span>
                    </span>
                </p>
                <ul class="">
                    <li v-for="note in resume.competences.notes">
                        <span v-text="note"></span>
                    </li>
                </ul>
                <p>
                    <span v-text="resume.competences.licence.name"></span>
                    :
                
                    <span>
                        <b v-text="resume.competences.licence.value"></b>
                    </span>
                </p>
                <p>
                    <span v-html="resume.competences.other"></span>
                </p>
            </div>
            <!-- <p class="theadr" v-text="resume.competences.projects.name"></p> -->
            <div class="content" v-for="pr in resume.competences.projects.value">
                <a :href="pr.link">
                    <p class="linktitle" v-text="pr.name"></p>
                </a>
                <p style="padding-left: 1px" v-html="pr.description"></p>
            </div>
        </section>
		
        <section class="section">
            <div class="tabs">
                <ul>
                    <li>
                        <a>
                            <span class="icon is-medium">
                                <i :class="['fa', 'fa-2x', 'fa-' + resume.other.icon]"></i>
                            </span>
                            <span class="title is-4" v-text="resume.other.title">Other Info</span>
                        </a>
                    </li>
                </ul>
            </div>

            <div class="column content paddingless">
                <ul>
                    <li v-for="othr in resume.other.moreinfo">
                        <span v-text="othr"></span>
                    </li>
                </ul>

                <div :class="resume.other.hobbies.display">
                    <span style="font-weight:bold" v-text="resume.other.hobbies.name + ':'">Hobbies:</span>
                    <span v-for="hob in resume.other.hobbies.value">
                        <span v-text="hob"></span>
                    </span>
                </div>
            </div>
            <br />
        </section>
    </div>

    <script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.7.1.min.js" integrity="sha256-/JqT3SQfawRcv/BIHPThkBvs0OEvtFFmqPF/lYI/Cxo=" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>

    <script>
        
        const commonMixin = {
            data() {
                const common = {
                    info: {
                        birthdate: new Date(1991, 5, 28),
                        email: 'laszlo.n4gy@gmail.com',
                        phoneNumbers: ['0775628622'],
                        website: '',
                        linkedin: '',
                        
                    },
                    experience: {
                        icon: "briefcase"
                    },
                    education: {
                        icon: "graduation-cap"
                    },
                    competences: {
                        icon: "fas fa-tachometer-alt"
                    },
                    other: {
                        icon: "male"
                    }
                }

                return {
                    en: common,
                    ro: common,
                    hu: common
                }
            }
        }


        new Vue({
            el: '#app',
            components: {},
            mixins: [commonMixin],
            methods: {
                onMouseover(e) {
                    console.log('onMouseover', this, e)
                    if (!e.isActive) {
                        e.isActive = true;
                    }
                }
                ,
                onMouseOut(e) {
                    console.log('onMouseOut', this, e);
                    e.isActive = false;
                }
                ,
                onTabClick(e){

                }
            },
            mounted() {
                console.log("app mounted");
                
                // this.resume = this.en;
            },
            computed: {
                resume() {
                    console.log("this.language", this.language);
                    switch (this.language) {
                        case "EN":
                            return this.en;
                            break;
                        case "HU":
                            return this.hu;
                            break;
                        case "RO":
                            return this.ro;
                            break;
                    }
                    return
                },
                yearold(){
                    var dif = new Date() - this.en.info.birthdate;
                    var ayear = 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 365;
                    return Math.floor(dif/ayear);
                },
                /* selectedlang(){
                    if (typeof(Storage) !== "undefined") {
                        // Code for localStorage/sessionStorage.
                        var lang = localStorage.getItem("selectedlang");
                        if (lang){
                            return lang;
                        } 
                        return "RO";
                    } else {
                        return "RO";
                    }
                } */
            },
            data: {
                en: {
                    info: {
                        name: 'Laszlo Nagy',
                        occupation: 'Self-employed',

                        yr:'years old',
                        summary:
                            `
                            Software developer with over five years of experience in software development. I am also working as a self-employed farmer. In software development I've worked on and assisted with various projects, acquiring a strong knowledge of OOP and best practices for efficient problem-solving. My strengths are persistence and a commitment to quality.
                            
                        `
                    },
                    experience: {
                        title: "Work experience",
                        jobs: [
                            
                            {
                                from: "2021-06",
                                to: "25-02",
                                position: 'Software Developer',
                                company: {
                                    name: 'Octavic PTS',
                                    location: "Oradea, Romania"
                                },
                                jobDescription: {
                                    summary: `
										Took part in the development of new system features and participated in the software design and architecture of the company\'s applications										
                                    `
                                    ,
                                    tasks: [
										"Develop and Maintain Software",
										"Testing & Debugging"
									]
                                }
                            }
                            ,
                            {
                                from: "2017-05",
                                to: "2017-09",
                                position: 'Worker',
                                company: {
                                    name: 'Stewarts of Tayside',
                                    location: "Scotland, United Kingdom"
                                },
                                jobDescription: {
                                    summary: `
                                        Strawberry picker,
                                        Packhouse worker  
                                    `
                                    ,
                                    tasks: []
                                }
                            }
                            ,
                            {
                                from: "2016-11",
                                to: "2017-02",
                                position: 'CNC Operator',
                                company: {
                                    name: 'GVG Alminium',
                                    location: "Biharia, Romania"
                                },
                                jobDescription: {
                                    summary: `
                                                                           
                                    `
                                    ,
                                    tasks: [
                                        "Supervising the operation of CNC machines.",
                                        "Worked in shifts of 12 hours following the \"12/24\" plan."
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                            ,
                            {
                                from: "2016-02",
                                to: "2016-09",
                                position: 'Warehouse operative',
                                company: {
                                    name: 'DHL',
                                    location: "Wellingborough, United Kingdom"
                                },
                                jobDescription: {
                                    summary: `
                                        Taking delivery of goods, and ensuring the booking in and transporting of stock is correct.
                                    `
                                    ,
                                    tasks: []
                                }
                            }
                            ,
                            {
                                from: "2015-03",
                                to: "2015-12",
                                position: 'Software Developer',
                                company: {
                                    name: 'Valgbar, Romania,',
                                    location: "Oradea"
                                },
                                jobDescription: {
                                    summary: `
                                        Contributed to the development and maintenance of several company projects, including the redesign of a web application.
                                    `
                                    // ,
                                    // tasks: [
                                    //     'devising possible solutions to anticipated problems',
                                    //     'working as part of a team, which may be established purely for a particular project to write a specific section of the program',
                                    //     'combining all elements of the program design and testing it',
                                    //     'testing sample data-sets to check that output from the program works as intended',
                                    //     'conducting testing and installing the program into production',
                                    //     'evaluating and increasing the program\'s effectiveness',
                                    //     'adapting the program to new requirements, as necessary'
                                    // ]
                                }
                            }
                            ,
                            {
                                from: "2014-12",
                                to: "2015-02",
                                position: 'Software Developer',
                                company: {
                                    name: 'Fecher, Romania, ',
                                    location: "Oradea"
                                },
                                jobDescription: {
                                    summary: `
                                       Rewriting the user interface and fixing issues in a project recompiled from Gupta to ASP.Net 
                                    `
                                    ,
                                    tasks: []
                                }
                            },
                            {
                                from: "2013-11",
                                to: "2014-11",
                                position: 'Software Developer',
                                company: {
                                    name: 'Eurosoft or Codespring, Romania, ',
                                    location: 'Cluj-Napoca'
                                    
                                },
                                jobDescription: {
                                    summary: `
                                        I was part of the team responsible for the development and maintenance of software products at DataColor Inc., a U.S.-based company specializing in color management solutions.
                                    `
                                    ,
                                    tasks: [
                                        'Implementing new features based on technical specifications',
                                        'Investigating and resolving bugs',
                                        'Replacing third-party WPF controls with .NET-native controls while maintaining required functionalities',
                                        'Assisting in testing before project releases',
										'Participating in project meetings and sharing knowledge with team members',
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                            ,
                            {
                                from: "2013-08",
                                to: "2013-11",
                                position: 'Junior ASP.Net Developer',
                                company: {
                                    name: 'Fortech, ',
                                    location: "Cluj-Napoca"
                                },
                                jobDescription: {
                                    summary: `
                                        Helping in the development and maintenance of the website <a href="http://refulog.de/" target="_blank">refulog.de</a> 
                                        `
                                    ,
                                    tasks: []
                                }
                            },
                            // ,
                            // {
                            //     from: "2012-07",
                            //     to: "2012-08",
                            //     position: 'Intern',
                            //     company: {
                            //         name: 'Qubiz, ',
                            //         location: "Oradea"
                            //     },
                            //     jobDescription: {
                            //         summary: `
                            //             Learned ASP.Net Web forms. 
                            //         `
                            //         ,
                            //         tasks: []
                            //     }
                            // }
                            {
                                from: "2012-04",
                                to: "present",
                                position: 'Farmer',
                                company: {
                                    name: 'P.F.A Nagy D Laszlo,',
                                    location: "Tămașeu"
                                },
                                jobDescription: {
                                    summary: `
                                    In 2012, I won a European grant aimed at encouraging young people to become farmers. It is now primarily a family business, where I assist as needed.
                                    `
                                    ,
                                    tasks: [

                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        ]
                    },
                    education: {
                        title: "Education",
                        sentences: [
                            {
                                from: "2010-09",
                                to: "2014-02",
                                institution: 'Babeş-Bolyai University',
                                specialty: 'Faculty of Mathematics and Computer Science',
                                reward: 'Bachelor\'s degree in Computer Science',
                                classes: {
                                    name: "Fields of study",
                                    value: [
                                        "Object Oriented Programming", "Databases", "Algorithms and Data Structures", "Advanced Programming Methods", "Software Engineering", "Functional & Logic Programming", "Artificial Intelligence"]
                                }
                            },
                            {
                                from: "2006",
                                to: "2010",
                                institution: 'Ady Endre Theoretical High School',
                                specialty: 'Mathemathics and information technology'
                            }
                        ]
                    },
                    competences: {
                        title: "Competences",
                        languages: {
                            name: "Languages",
                            collection: [
                                {
                                    name: "English",
                                    value: "fluent",
                                    isActive: false
                                }
                                ,
                                {
                                    name: "Hungarian",
                                    value: "native",
                                    isActive: false
                                }
                                ,
                                {
                                    name: "Romanian",
                                    value: "fluent",
                                    isActive: false
                                }
                            ]
                        },
                        technical: {
                            name: "technical summary",
                            value:[
                            {
                                lang: ".net",
                                level: {
                                    name: "advanced",
                                    value: 50
                                }
                                ,
                                notes: 'C#, ASP.Net, Entity framework, linq'
                            },
                            {
                                lang: "javascript",
                                level: {
                                    name: "advanced",
                                    value: 50
                                }
                                ,
                                notes: 'Html5, CSS, jQuery, Vue js, Cordova'
                            },
                            {
                                lang: "dart",
                                level: {
                                    name: "novice",
                                    value: 25
                                }
                                ,
                                notes: 'flutter'
                            },
                            ]
                        },
                        otherCompetences : [
                           
                        ],
                        notes: [
                            "familiar with git, svn, SQL, IIS and Azure devops",
                            "proeficient with Microsoft office tools (Word, Excel, Powerpoint)"
                            
                        ],
                        licence: {
                            name: "Driver's licence",
                            value: "B"
                        },
                        other: "<b>ISCIR</b> forklift certified (2020)",
                        projects: {
                            name: "Projects",
                            value: [
                                {
                                    name: "Mobile games",
                                    link: "https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.lnagy.squares",
                                    description: "Developed several android mobile games in my spare time, published on the Play Store for a period. Built using Apache Cordova and Unity. Available for demonstration upon request."
                                }
                                
                            ]
                        }

                        //     1 : 'My greatest accommplishment so far was getting a Bachelor\'s degree in Computer Science. \

                    },

                            },
                        moreinfo: ["non-smoker" , "not married"]    //"cryptocurrency enthusiast",
                    }

                ro: {
                    info: {
                        name: 'Laszlo Nagy',
                        occupation: 'Lucrător independent',
                        
                        yr:'ani',
                        summary:
                            `
                            Programator cu peste cinci ani de experiență în dezvoltarea de software, în prezent activ în domeniul agricol ca persoană fizică autorizată. De-a lungul activității mele în domeniul IT, am lucrat și am asistat la diverse proiecte, dobândind cunoștințe solide în programarea orientată pe obiecte (OOP) și cele mai bune practici pentru soluționarea eficientă a problemelor. Punctele mele puternice includ perseverența și angajamentul față de calitate.
                        `
                        //Sunt prudent și orientat spre calitate. 
                    },

                hu: {
                    info: {
                        name: 'Nagy László',
                        occupation: 'Vállalkozó' ,
                        
                        yr:'éves',
                        summary:
                            `
                            Több mint öt év tapasztalattal rendelkező szoftverfejlesztő munkát keres az IT szektorban. A szoftverfejlesztés területén különböző projektekben dolgoztam és segédkeztem, amelyek során alapos ismereteket szereztem az objektumorientált programozásban (OOP), valamint a problémamegoldásban. Erősségeim közé tartozik a kitartás és az elkötelezettség a minőség iránt.
                            Ezenkivül rengeteget foglalkoztam teszteléssel, hibakijavitással es nem nyugszom mig minden nem tökéletes.
                            Rendkivül türelmes vagyok es barátságos. Szivesen segitek akin tudok. Es szeretek kiokosítani másokat ami szerintem egy jó tulajdonság.
                        `
                        // In prezent lucrez ca fermier, lucrasem in agricultara de cand eram mic. Am mai lucrat și in domeniul IT ca programator mai mult de 2 ani. Sunt prudent și orientat spre calitate. 
                    },
                    experience: {

                    },

                    },
                    competences: {
                        title: "Ismeretek",

                        },
                        technical: {
                            name: "Technikai Kompetenciák",
                            value:[
                            {
                                lang: ".net",

                                    name: "jó",
                                    value: 50
                                }
                                ,
                                notes: 'C#, ASP.Net, Entity framework, linq'

                            },

                                level: {
                                    name: "kezdő",
                                    value: 25
                                }
                                ,

                            },
                            ]
                        },
                        notes: [
                            "SQL, REST funkciók, git, svn, Azure devops, IIS",
                            "Jó ismerete a Microsoft Office csomagnak (MS Office – Word, Excel, PowerPoint)",
                           
                        ],
                        licence: {
                            name: "Jogositvány",
                            value: "B"
                        },
                        other:  "<b>ISCIR</b> Targonca jogosítvány (2020)",
                        projects: {
                            name: "Projektek",
                            value: [
                                {
                                    name: "Applikációk",
                                    link: "https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.lnagy.squares",
                                    description: "Szabadidőmben több mobiljátékot is fejlesztettem, amelyek egy ideig fent voltak a Play Áruházban. Apache Cordova és Unity segítségével készültek. Igény szerint bemutathatók."
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    },
                    other: {
                        title: "Egyéb",
                        hobbies: {
                            name: "Hobbik:",
                            value: ["zene, ", 'számítógépes játékok, ', 'biciklizés' ],
                            display: "notvisible"
                            },
                        moreinfo: ["nem dohanyzó", "egyedulálló"]
                    }
                },
                language: "EN"
            }
        })

        $(function(){
            var canvas = document.getElementById( 'canvas' ),
                ctx = canvas.getContext( '2d' ),
                canvas2 = document.getElementById( 'canvas2' ),
                ctx2 = canvas2.getContext( '2d' ),
                // full screen dimensions
                cw = window.innerWidth,
                ch = window.innerHeight,
            charArr = ['a','b','c','d','e','f','g','h','i','j','k','l','m','n','o','p','q','r','s','t','u','v','w','x','y','z', '1','2', '3', '4', '5','6', '7', '8', '9'],
            maxCharCount = 9900,
            fallingCharArr = [],
            fontSize = 12,
            maxColums = cw/(fontSize);
            canvas.width = canvas2.width = cw;
            canvas.height = canvas2.height = ch;


            function randomInt( min, max ) {
                return Math.floor(Math.random() * ( max - min ) + min);
            }

            function randomFloat( min, max ) {
                return Math.random() * ( max - min ) + min;
            }

            function Point(x,y)
            {
            this.x = x;
            this.y = y;
            }

            Point.prototype.draw = function(ctx){

            this.value = charArr[randomInt(0,charArr.length-1)].toUpperCase();
            this.speed = randomFloat(1,5);


            ctx2.fillStyle = "rgba(255,255,255,0.8)";
            ctx2.font = fontSize+"px san-serif";
            ctx2.fillText(this.value,this.x,this.y);

                ctx.fillStyle = "#0F0";
                ctx.font = fontSize+"px san-serif";
                ctx.fillText(this.value,this.x,this.y);



                this.y += this.speed;
                if(this.y > ch)
                {
                this.y = randomFloat(-100,0);
                this.speed = randomFloat(2,5);
                }
            }

            for(var i = 0; i < maxColums * 2 ; i++) {
                fallingCharArr.push(new Point(i*fontSize, randomFloat(-2000,0)));
            }


            var update = function()
            {

            ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(0,0,0,0.05)";
            ctx.fillRect(0,0,cw,ch);

            ctx2.clearRect(0,0,cw,ch);

            var i = fallingCharArr.length;

            while (i--) {
                fallingCharArr[i].draw(ctx);
                var v = fallingCharArr[i];
            }

            requestAnimationFrame(update);
            }

            update();
        })
    </script>
</body>

</html>
